name: Streamax Technology Co., Ltd.
summary: Streamax Technology Co., Ltd. researches and develops, manufactures, and sells artificial intelligence (AI) powered mobile surveillance and industrial management solutions for commercial vehicles worldwide. The company offers mobile digital video recorders and MDVR accessories; and artificial, IP, AHD, and analog cameras. It also provides AI, refuse vehicle, transit bus video surveillance, school bus vehicles tracking management, taxi fleet management surveillance, vehicles tracking management, fleet management and surveillance, fuel stolen proof, trains and trams surveillance, police motorcycle recording, and intelligent transportation systems. In addition, the company offers technical support services. Its products focus on safety and operational management for commercial vehicles in various industries, such as taxis, buses, dump trucks, transportation trucks, and others. The company was founded in 2002 and is headquartered in Shenzhen, the People's Republic of China.
